title: 22:18 芒聙聰 July 11, 2022
body_text:
22:18 芒聙聰 July 11, 2022
ATM and POS Part Update
We reviewed and edited content in the ATM and POS Part. As a result, some chapter and section headings were revised. We removed all references to 芒聙聹CUETS芒聙聺 and the 芒聙聹POS In-Branch芒聙聺 service and updated the following references:
芒聙聹Canadian EXCHANGE芒聙聺 to 芒聙聹THE EXCHANGE芒聙聺
芒聙聹US EXCHANGE芒聙聺 to 芒聙聹Allpoint芒聙聺
芒聙聹Direct Cash Payments芒聙聺 to 芒聙聹Cardtronics
Electronic Transactions Volume
ATM and POS Part
Section 1.2, ATM and POS Services, Networks, and Rules
芒聙垄
We removed the 芒聙聹Transactions Allowed芒聙聺 details (these are available in the applicable network Rules).
芒聙垄
We updated the link for THE EXCHANGE network.
芒聙垄
We updated the Participants description for the Allpoint network
Section 1.3, Accessing the Governing Rules
We deleted this section and moved relevant details to Section 1.6, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources.
Section 1.4, Retention of Records
We updated the retention dates for ATM and POS transaction records.
Section 1.5, Fraud Solutions
We added CNP (card not present) to the types of transactions monitored for fraudulent activity.
Section 1.6, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources
芒聙垄
We updated contact information for Central 1 Switching & Card Services and added a list of the regulations they provide.
芒聙垄
We added contact information for FICANEX Services
芒聙垄
We updated Resources/Services and contact information for THE EXCHANGE Network
芒聙垄
We added 芒聙聹National Credit Union Route and Transit Listing芒聙聺 to the Resources/Services for CCUA
芒聙垄
We added contact information for FINTRAC
Section 1.7, ATM and POS Document Library
We updated content to reflect that subscription services are no longer restricted to BC and Ontario credit unions.
Section 2.1, Definitions
We added definitions for Allpoint and CNP.
Section 5.3, Route and Transit and AFT Adjustment Account Listings
We removed login procedures to CCUA and THE EXCHANGE. Links to these websites are provided in Section 1.6, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources.
Section 5.6, Notifying Issuer of Exception Deposits
We updated the acquirer芒聙聶s notification requirements for THE EXCHANGE and ACCULINK deposits.
Section 5.7, Endorsing Cheques
We renamed this section to 芒聙聹Identification Stamps芒聙聺.
Section 6.2, Receiving Notification of Exception Deposits
We updated the instances when the issuer will receive notifications from the acquirer regarding THE EXCHANGE and ACCULINK deposits.
Section 7.3, Time and Dollar Amount Restrictions on ATM Transactions
We deleted the table of restrictions for ACCULINK and THE EXCHANGE and added a cross reference to the applicable operating policies and procedures.
Section 9.7, ATM and POS Dispute Resolution
We reorganized the information and updated the list of reference documents.
Section 10.1, ATM and POS Settlement
We added ET settlement cut-off times for all the networks and updated the cut-off time for Allpoint to 5:59:59 pm PT/8:59:59 pm ET.
Section 10.3, ATM and POS Report Distribution
We updated the note to indicate that
all
ATM and POS transaction records must be retained for seven years.
Section 11.6, Handling Traces for all Networks Except THE EXCHANGE
We added that a Request for Information must be returned within five business days if it芒聙聶s marked as a FINTRAC inquiry.
Section 11.7, Handling Traces for THE EXCHANGE
We added that a Request for Information must be returned within five business days if it芒聙聶s marked as a FINTRAC inquiry.
